creator: serpent7776@gmail.com
text:
by `make -d d config` in poudriere I mean `poudriere jail -s` and then jexecing into the jail.

I have no /usr/bin/bmake on my system.
I had /usr/local/bin/bmake instaled from 'devel/bmake' port and this casused this error - when I deleted bmake port everything worked as should.
